query: light leak halation orange red film overexposed analog
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / film_artifacts: light leaks, halation, overexposed film

response.objective_caption: A glowing orange and yellow light source centered against a black background, radiating outward in concentric gradients from bright white at the core to deep red at the edges, with a small bright speck visible in the upper right quadrant.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A heavily blurred and indistinct glowing mass of orange and yellow light with no discernible subject or fine detail, the center blown out to pure white and crushed into featureless abstraction, suffocating under oppressive low contrast where light and dark barely separate, presenting as an abstract non-representational image where form dissolves entirely into color and radiance.
